Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 141 

SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_SCRNG_CMPST_IND 

LABEL: Core HRSN Housing 2: Problems Composite 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) composite indicator that housing has 
problems with pests, mold, lead, heat, oven, smoke detectors, and/or water. 

LONG NAME: SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_SCRNG_CMPST_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived)
